title: selaginella hirsuta
intro: Selaginella hirsuta, also known as the hairy spike moss or prickly spike moss, is a species of vascular plant belonging to the Selaginella genus. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of fever and cough. Selaginella hirsuta is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected areas.
